sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 42:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 42:1
items.html: Two couplings: 1 – The incorporation of the female in the male and the level that is extended in the measure of the male. 2 – The incorporation of the male in the female and the level is extended in the measure of the female. (Inner Light, Item‎ 9)
